calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Aw Ard As Judgment; Memorandum Of Law
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC. Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Aw Ard As Judgment.

Petitioner Broadway Music Inc.'s unopposed Petition to Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award as Judgment is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the October 25, 2024, contractual arbitration award is confirmed as a judgment in favor of Broadcast Music Inc., as petitioner, and against Zen Compound LLC dba Temple Nightclub, as respondent, in the principal sum of $22,156.00, together with prejudgment interest of $909.41 (based on the daily rate of $4.31 per day from October 1, 2024, through April 30, 2025, at the contract rate of 9% per annum), plus recoverable costs of suit of $555.00, for a total judgment of $23,620.41.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
